name: chart-pie-interactive
visual_summary: Chart Pie Interactive is an engaging and interactive chart component, ideal for displaying multiple data points as a circular pie chart. Developed for use cases where dynamic data is regularly updated, allowing users to hover over sections for detailed insights. A perfect fit for showcasing complex data in an intuitive and visually appealing way.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-pie-interactive
Description: Chart Pie Interactive is an engaging and interactive chart component, ideal for displaying multiple data points as a circular pie chart. Developed for use cases where dynamic data is regularly updated, allowing users to hover over sections for detailed insights. A perfect fit for showcasing complex data in an intuitive and visually appealing way.
Style: modern
Interactions: animated, hover, clickable
Tags: chart, interactive, visualization, data, pie

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
